_source_notes.aws_subnet: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/subnet — all boolean attributes default to false, enable_lni_at_device_index defaults to 0, private_dns_hostname_type_on_launch defaults to ip-name
_source_notes.aws_vpc: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/vpc — enable_dns_support defaults to true, enable_dns_hostnames defaults to false, instance_tenancy defaults to default, assign_generated_ipv6_cidr_block defaults to false, enable_network_address_usage_metrics defaults to false, ipv6_netmask_length is 0 when no IPv6 CIDR assigned
_source_notes.aws_internet_gateway: region is a Terraformer artifact that echoes the provider region; it is not a configurable attribute in the resource schema
_source_notes.aws_instance.flat: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/instance — disable_api_stop/termination default false, ebs_optimized default false, get_password_data default false, hibernation default false, instance_initiated_shutdown_behavior default stop, ipv6_address_count default 0, monitoring default false, source_dest_check default true, tenancy default default. associate_public_ip_address and availability_zone are NOT defaults — they depend on subnet config and AZ placement respectively, so they are preserved. private_ip is always preserved (hard-coded IP). placement_partition_number is computed/read-only.
_source_notes.aws_instance.metadata_options: http_endpoint defaults to enabled, http_protocol_ipv6 defaults to disabled, http_put_response_hop_limit defaults to 1, http_tokens defaults to optional (IMDSv1), instance_metadata_tags defaults to disabled — https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/instance#metadata_options
_source_notes.aws_instance.private_dns_name_options: enable_resource_name_dns_a_record defaults to false, enable_resource_name_dns_aaaa_record defaults to false, hostname_type defaults to ip-name — https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/instance#private_dns_name_options
_source_notes.aws_instance.root_block_device: delete_on_termination defaults to true, encrypted defaults to false. volume_size (8 GB) and volume_type are NOT in registry because they are configuration choices, not safe defaults to remove. Removing them would allow Terraform to revert to provider defaults on re-apply.
_source_notes.aws_instance.cpu_options: NOT in registry — core_count and threads_per_core are instance-type-dependent; preserving per user instruction.
_source_notes.aws_instance.credit_specification: NOT in registry — cpu_credits (unlimited vs standard) is instance-type-dependent; preserving per user instruction.
_source_notes.region_rule: The region attribute on any resource (aws_subnet, aws_vpc, aws_internet_gateway, aws_instance) is a Terraformer artifact. It is handled by a universal rule in default_remover.py, not registry lookup, because it is not a real configurable attribute — it merely echoes the provider region.
_source_notes.primary_network_interface: Dropped by noise_remover.py as a computed block containing a hard-coded ENI ID.
_source_notes.azurerm_resource_group: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/resource_group — no optional attributes carry provider-side defaults that Terraformer would emit; name and location are required.
_source_notes.azurerm_virtual_network: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/virtual_network — bgp_community, dns_servers, edge_zone are optional with no default; ddos_protection_plan.enable defaults to false when the block is present. encryption.enforcement has no default value. flow_timeout_in_minutes = 0 is a Terraformer sentinel meaning 'not configured' — valid range is 4–30, so 0 must be stripped as noise.
_source_notes.azurerm_subnet: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/subnet — private_endpoint_network_policies defaults to Disabled, private_link_service_network_policies_enabled defaults to true, default_outbound_access_enabled defaults to true, service_endpoint_policy_ids and service_endpoints default to empty. enforce_private_link_endpoint_network_policies, enforce_private_link_service_network_policies, and private_endpoint_network_policies_enabled are all deprecated aliases (removed in v4.0) that Terraformer emits — they must be stripped to avoid deprecation warnings and conflict errors.
_source_notes.azurerm_public_ip: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/public_ip — ddos_protection_mode defaults to VirtualNetworkInherited, idle_timeout_in_minutes defaults to 4, ip_version defaults to IPv4, sku defaults to Basic (for Dynamic allocation) or Standard, sku_tier defaults to Regional, zones defaults to empty.
_source_notes.azurerm_network_interface: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/network_interface — accelerated_networking_enabled defaults to false, ip_forwarding_enabled defaults to false, dns_servers defaults to empty, edge_zone and internal_dns_name_label are optional. enable_accelerated_networking and enable_ip_forwarding are deprecated aliases (removed in v4.0) that Terraformer emits — they must be stripped.
_source_notes.azurerm_network_interface.ip_configurati: primary is computed (true for first config), private_ip_address is computed when Dynamic allocation is used — not a safe default to remove.
_source_notes.azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.flat: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/linux_virtual_machine — allow_extension_operations defaults to true, bypass_platform_safety_checks_on_user_schedule_enabled defaults to false, computer_name defaults to name value, disable_password_authentication defaults to true when no admin_password set (false when password is set), encryption_at_host_enabled defaults to false, extensions_time_budget defaults to PT1H30M, patch_assessment_mode defaults to ImageDefault, patch_mode defaults to ImageDefault, priority defaults to Regular, provision_vm_agent defaults to true, secure_boot_enabled defaults to false, vtpm_enabled defaults to false. platform_fault_domain = -1 is a Terraformer sentinel meaning 'not in a scale set'. max_bid_price = -1 is a Terraformer sentinel meaning 'not a Spot VM'. disk_controller_type and vm_agent_platform_updates_enabled are computed/Terraformer-only attributes — all four must be stripped as noise.
_source_notes.azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.os_disk: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/linux_virtual_machine#os_disk — caching is required (no default), storage_account_type is required (no default). write_accelerator_enabled defaults to false, disk_size_gb is computed when omitted, secure_vm_disk_encryption_set_id and security_encryption_type are optional.
_source_notes.azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.boot_diagn: storage_account_uri defaults to null (managed storage) when block is present without a URI — https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/linux_virtual_machine#boot_diagnostics
_source_notes.azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.terminatio: enabled is required when block is present; timeout defaults to PT5M — https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/linux_virtual_machine#termination_notification
_source_notes.aws_eip: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/eip — vpc is deprecated and removed in provider v5, Terraformer still emits it — __DROP__.
_source_notes.aws_s3_bucket: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/s3_bucket — force_destroy defaults to false, object_lock_enabled defaults to false.
_source_notes.aws_iam_role: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/iam_role — force_detach_policies defaults to false, max_session_duration defaults to 3600, path defaults to /.
_source_notes.aws_launch_template: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/launch_template — disable_api_stop defaults to false, disable_api_termination defaults to false, ebs_optimized defaults to false, instance_initiated_shutdown_behavior defaults to stop, update_default_version defaults to false.
_source_notes.aws_autoscaling_group: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/autoscaling_group — capacity_rebalance defaults to false, protect_from_scale_in defaults to false, wait_for_capacity_timeout defaults to 10m.
_source_notes.aws_lb: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/lb — enable_deletion_protection defaults to false, idle_timeout defaults to 60, ip_address_type defaults to ipv4, desync_mitigation_mode defaults to defensive, drop_invalid_header_fields defaults to false. enable_cross_zone_load_balancing intentionally omitted — default differs between ALB (true) and NLB (false).
_source_notes.aws_alb: Alias for aws_lb — same defaults apply.
_source_notes.aws_lb_target_group: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/lb_target_group — connection_termination defaults to false, deregistration_delay defaults to 300, lambda_multi_value_headers_enabled defaults to false, load_balancing_algorithm_type defaults to round_robin, load_balancing_anomaly_mitigation defaults to off, proxy_protocol_v2 defaults to false, slow_start defaults to 0, target_type defaults to instance, ip_address_type defaults to ipv4.
_source_notes.aws_alb_target_group: Alias for aws_lb_target_group — same defaults apply.
_source_notes.aws_db_instance: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/db_instance — apply_immediately defaults to false, auto_minor_version_upgrade defaults to true, backup_retention_period defaults to 0, copy_tags_to_snapshot defaults to false, deletion_protection defaults to false, iam_database_authentication_enabled defaults to false, multi_az defaults to false, performance_insights_enabled defaults to false, publicly_accessible defaults to false, skip_final_snapshot defaults to false, storage_encrypted defaults to false.
_source_notes.azurerm_windows_virtual_machine: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/windows_virtual_machine — mirrors azurerm_linux_virtual_machine defaults with Windows-specific differences: enable_automatic_updates defaults to true, hotpatching_enabled defaults to false, patch_mode defaults to AutomaticByOS. platform_fault_domain = -1 and max_bid_price = -1 are Terraformer sentinels. disk_controller_type and vm_agent_platform_updates_enabled are computed/Terraformer-only — __DROP__.
_source_notes.azurerm_network_security_group: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/network_security_group — no provider-side defaults that Terraformer emits beyond the universal region rule; tags={} is not stripped (user may have intentionally set no tags).
_source_notes.azurerm_storage_account: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/azurerm/latest/docs/resources/storage_account — access_tier defaults to Hot, cross_tenant_replication_enabled defaults to false (since provider v3.114), default_to_oauth_authentication defaults to false, https_traffic_only_enabled defaults to true, infrastructure_encryption_enabled defaults to false, is_hns_enabled defaults to false, large_file_share_enabled defaults to false, min_tls_version defaults to TLS1_2, nfsv3_enabled defaults to false, public_network_access_enabled defaults to true, sftp_enabled defaults to false, shared_access_key_enabled defaults to true. enable_https_traffic_only is deprecated alias removed in provider v4.0 — __DROP__.
